FEATURES.LABEL: FEATURES
FEATURES.TITLE: Everything you need to run your institution
FEATURES.SUBTITLE: Powerful features designed to make school administration simple, transparent, and efficient.
FEATURES.SIS_DESC: Manage student records, enrollment, attendance, and grades in one centralized, secure database.
FEATURES.SCHED_DESC: Generate clash-free timetables for classes, teachers, and exams automatically with our smart scheduler.
FEATURES.COMM_DESC: Keep teachers, parents, and students in sync with built-in messaging, announcements, and push notifications.

TESTIMONIALS.LABEL: TESTIMONIALS
TESTIMONIALS.TITLE: Loved by educators and administrators
TESTIMONIALS.SUBTITLE: Here is what school leaders are saying about their transition to EduSaaS.
TESTIMONIALS.QUOTE_1: EduSaaS has completely revolutionized our daily operations. Tasks that used to take days now take hours, and parents love the mobile app.
TESTIMONIALS.QUOTE_2: The migration was seamless, and the uptime is rock solid. It's rare to find an enterprise school portal that is this easy to use.

PRICING.PROF_DESC: For medium-sized schools looking to scale
PRICING.ENT_DESC: For large school networks and universities

FAQ.LABEL: FAQ
FAQ.TITLE: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.SUBTITLE: Have questions about EduSaaS? We have answers.
FAQ.A1: No, there are no hidden setup fees. We provide free remote onboarding support to get your team up and running.
FAQ.A2: Absolutely. You can export student records, reports, grades, and attendance data to CSV or PDF format at any time.
FAQ.A3: Yes. We offer interactive webinars, video tutorials, and dedicated training sessions for teachers and administrators.
